layers.nm: Uncertainty Detected! Hesitation markers (“Ah, well, we...”) indicate lack of confidence.

layers.nm: Ah, well, we... I think we have servers in Frankfurt? I’m not 100% sure on the specific certifications right now.

s.t: Ah, well, we... I think we have servers in Frankfurt? I’m not 100% sure on the specific certifications right now.

layers.nm: That’s impressive numbers. What about data residency? We have strict compliance requirements in the EU.

s.t: That’s impressive numbers. What about data residency? We have strict compliance requirements in the EU.

layers.nm: I understand completely. Scalability is actually our core strength. We handle over 1M requests per second with 99.9% uptime.

s.t: I understand completely. Scalability is actually our core strength. We handle over 1M requests per second with 99.9% uptime.

layers.nm: Sounds good. We’re mainly looking for scalability and security. Our current solution is struggling with the new load.

s.t: Sounds good. We’re mainly looking for scalability and security. Our current solution is struggling with the new load.

layers.nm: Thanks everyone for joining. Today I want to walk you through our enterprise tier and see how we can align with your Q4 goals.

s.t: Thanks everyone for joining. Today I want to walk you through our enterprise tier and see how we can align with your Q4 goals.
